expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves donut-label assumptions for label visibility, density limits, and overlap-sensitive presentation
expectations.evidence: The artifact explicitly states the required focus and then enumerates assumptions under the three required categories: "Context intake must explicitly preserve donut-label assumptions for: - Label visibility - Density limits - Overlap-sensitive presentation" and provides sections "A. Label visibility assumptions", "B. Density limits assumptions", and "C. Overlap-sensitive presentation assumptions".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The document is labeled and scoped to Phase 1 context intake: "VIZ-P1-CONTEXT-INTAKE-001 — Phase 1 (Context Intake) QA Plan Artifact" and "Phase 1 is limited to context intake". It avoids later-phase test design/execution and instead records assumptions-to-validate and "Phase 1 required clarifications" plus "Phase 1 exit criteria".
